What we do

From first sketch to years of reliable service

For over 40 years we've designed, supplied, installed and maintained commercial kitchens across London and the South East — taking every project from conception to finished article, then looking after it long after handover.

01 Design 02 Supply 03 Install 04 Service
01  Design

Design

Every good kitchen starts with a plan. We work from your space, menu and covers to design a kitchen that flows — from first paper sketches through to full CAD drawings you can sign off with confidence.

  • Site surveys and detailed space planning
  • Workflow-led layouts built around your menu and volumes
  • Full CAD drawings and equipment schedules
  • Ventilation, gas, electrical and drainage planned in from the start
  • Budgets and phasing to suit your project and timescale
02  Supply

Supply

As UK agents for the industry's leading manufacturers, we specify the right equipment for the job — new or fully reconditioned — at genuinely competitive prices.

  • Agents for Rational, Blue Seal, Hobart, Falcon, Gram, Williams, Foster, Parry & Valentine
  • New and fully reconditioned equipment
  • Prime cooking, refrigeration, warewashing and preparation
  • Independent advice on the right specification for you
  • Competitive, transparent pricing
03  Install

Installation

Our team delivers the full fit-out — everything built, connected and finished to standard, ready to pass inspection and go straight into service.

  • Bespoke stainless steel fabrication, made to measure
  • Extraction canopies and ventilation systems
  • Gas and electrical connection
  • Hygienic wall cladding and non-slip safety flooring
  • Project managed from delivery through to sign-off
04  Service

Service & maintenance

We don't disappear after handover. From planned maintenance to repairs and call-outs, we keep your kitchen running — whatever make or model you have.

  • Planned preventative maintenance contracts
  • Servicing and repairs for all makes of equipment
  • Genuine spare parts
  • Detergents and consumables
Need an engineer? Ask about our call-out service — call 07710 002333
The full picture

Built to a standard that gets recognised

Our work has been honoured with a Civic Trust Award — recognition for excellence in the built environment. It's the same care and quality we bring to every kitchen we touch, from a single appliance to a complete fit-out.

See who we work with
